webSearch.apiKey.label: Bright Data API Token
webSearch.apiKey.help: Bright Data API token for search and scraping (fallback: BRIGHTDATA_API_TOKEN env var).

webSearch.baseUrl.label: Bright Data API Base URL
webSearch.baseUrl.help: Bright Data API base URL override.

webSearch.unlockerZone.label: Bright Data Unlocker Zone
webSearch.unlockerZone.help: Bright Data Web Unlocker zone name (default: mcp_unlocker).

webSearch.browserZone.label: Bright Data Browser Zone
webSearch.browserZone.help: Bright Data Browser API zone name (default: mcp_browser).

webSearch.timeoutSeconds.label: Bright Data Timeout (sec)
webSearch.timeoutSeconds.help: Default timeout in seconds for Bright Data search, scrape, and browser credential requests.

webSearch.pollingTimeoutSeconds.label: Bright Data Polling Timeout (sec)
webSearch.pollingTimeoutSeconds.help: Default polling timeout in seconds for dataset-backed Bright Data tools.
